title: Equipment for Overlapping compliant
wikitext:
[]: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Registration2 » Wed Aug 25, 2021 8:25 am When WILLE gets the EURO NERV, mari talks about getting parts for New Unit 02 and the Overlapping compliant. I don't understand the second part, what kind of equipment is it? For a second I thought it was an ability derived from devouring the mark.09A, but it was something build before it. So do we have an idea of what kind of thing it was? How did EURO NERV built it or at least stored and when?

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Wed Aug 25, 2021 11:37 am I think the equipment from the Paris base is what enables Unit-08 to absorb or "overlap" with Mks 9-12.

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Registration2 » Thu Aug 26, 2021 10:26 am NightComesOn wrote: I think the equipment from the Paris base is what enables Unit-08 to absorb or "overlap" with Mks 9-12.

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Aug 26, 2021 12:32 pm Considering that the vessels are pretty much just angels, it's not an unreasonable assumption that the gear Wille picked up was originally meant for the purpose of neutralizing angels by ways of absorption, and they simply repurposed it. Alternatively, it might also have been intended as an artificial impact trigger in case the original scenario didn't go as planned

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Thu Aug 26, 2021 1:49 pm Yeah, but don't you find that strange? They built something like that to travel into the minus space, how did they do it? was that in the big brain plan? Mari never played a big role in gendo's plan, and if he and nerv was guarding the facility holding it, wouldn't be better to simply destroy such equipment?

Article: Equipment for Overlapping compliant
[]: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Registration2 » Wed Aug 25, 2021 8:25 am When WILLE gets the EURO NERV, mari talks about getting parts for New Unit 02 and the Overlapping compliant. I don't understand the second part, what kind of equipment is it? For a second I thought it was an ability derived from devouring the mark.09A, but it was something build before it. So do we have an idea of what kind of thing it was? How did EURO NERV built it or at least stored and when?

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Wed Aug 25, 2021 11:37 am I think the equipment from the Paris base is what enables Unit-08 to absorb or "overlap" with Mks 9-12.

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Registration2 » Thu Aug 26, 2021 10:26 am NightComesOn wrote: I think the equipment from the Paris base is what enables Unit-08 to absorb or "overlap" with Mks 9-12.

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Aug 26, 2021 12:32 pm Considering that the vessels are pretty much just angels, it's not an unreasonable assumption that the gear Wille picked up was originally meant for the purpose of neutralizing angels by ways of absorption, and they simply repurposed it. Alternatively, it might also have been intended as an artificial impact trigger in case the original scenario didn't go as planned

[]: Re: Equipment for Overlapping compliant.             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Thu Aug 26, 2021 1:49 pm Yeah, but don't you find that strange? They built something like that to travel into the minus space, how did they do it? was that in the big brain plan? Mari never played a big role in gendo's plan, and if he and nerv was guarding the facility holding it, wouldn't be better to simply destroy such equipment?
